_description: Maps trading sessions to valid strategies and time windows. The auto-trading system should only evaluate strategies that are valid for the current session.
_source: ChartFanatics strategy time windows + ICT kill zone theory

asian.characteristics: Low volatility, range building, accumulation phase. Liquidity builds at session high/low.
asian.notes: Mark Asian High/Low as key liquidity levels for London/NY sweeps. Do not aggressively trade in this session — it's accumulation.

london_open.characteristics: High volatility. Manipulation phase — sweeps Asian highs/lows. Displacement candles common.

kill_zone_windows.name: London Kill Zone (Trident)
kill_zone_windows.notes: Look for 3-candle FVG on 30M + doji wicking into FVG 50% + EMA stack aligned

london_open.notes: Prime time for Forex and Gold. Sweeps of Asian session levels are high-probability setups.

london_ny_overlap.characteristics: Highest liquidity period globally. Distribution phase. Strongest moves and best fills.

kill_zone_windows.name: AMD Prime Window 1
kill_zone_windows.notes: Manipulation phase typically completes here. Look for displacement + FVG.

kill_zone_windows.name: SMT Manipulation Check
kill_zone_windows.notes: Check if NQ/ES diverge at this time — classic SMT divergence window.

london_ny_overlap.notes: This is where the money is made. All strategy archetypes valid. Full confluence checking.

ny_afternoon.characteristics: Declining volatility. Trend continuation or reversal setups. Less manipulation.
ny_afternoon.notes: Reduce position sizes. Avoid new entries after 14:00 ET for day trades. Swing trade entries can be taken.

ny_close.characteristics: End of day. Position squaring. Mark daily levels for next day.
ny_close.notes: No new entries. Close intraday positions. Log session summary.

no_trade_rules.description: No entries in first 15 minutes of NY session (9:30-9:45 ET)
no_trade_rules.reason: Opening volatility spike creates false signals and wide spreads

no_trade_rules.description: No entries within 5 minutes before or after FOMC, NFP, CPI, GDP, PPI releases
no_trade_rules.reason: Extreme volatility and slippage. Wait for dust to settle, then analyze.

no_trade_rules.description: No new entries after 14:00 ET on Fridays
no_trade_rules.reason: Weekend gap risk. Position squaring creates noise.

no_trade_rules.description: No trading on US/UK bank holidays

crypto_override.description: Crypto markets trade 24/7 but still respond to traditional session times

session_bias.asian: Accumulation — range building, lower conviction signals
session_bias.london_open: Medium — some manipulation of Asian levels
session_bias.london_ny_overlap: Highest — strongest crypto moves align with TradFi sessions
session_bias.weekend: Low — avoid aggressive entries, wider stops needed

crypto_override.notes: Apply session routing but with relaxed filters. All strategies remain available for crypto but confidence multiplier should be reduced outside London/NY overlap.
